---
title: "Grace Sen - Group 3 Individual Participation Report"
author: "Grace Sen"
date: today
format: html
---

# Individual Participation Report

## Group Information

-   **Group:** 3
-   **Project:** Predicting Customer Conversion in Digital Marketing
-   **Group Members:** Yushan, Sora, Grace, Sandy, Jungmin

## My Contributions

At this stage of the project, my contributions have mainly focused on planning and team coordination. My responsibilities include:

- Created the GitHub repository for the group project.
- Participated actively in group meetings and project discussions.
- Helped evaluate and select the dataset.
- Communicated with Professor on behalf of the group to clarify project requirements and answer questions.
- Assisted with organizing the project structure and planning the presentation.

## Reflection

Since the project is still in its early stages, most of our work has focused on planning and preparation. I believe establishing a clear project structure and maintaining communication within the group are important first steps. As the project progresses, I plan to contribute to the data analysis, presentation development, and interpretation of the results.
